query: SELECT nomeExame COLLATE utf8mb4_bin as nome, COUNT(*) as total FROM resultadosExames WHERE nomeExame COLLATE utf8mb4_bin IN ('hiv', 'tsh', 'urocultura', 'vdrl') GROUP BY nomeExame COLLATE utf8mb4_bin
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3v7At4WPQpm4aRf.9e6a8ae0e28e --database bSA4q7aMJsJeSmafooCq7A --execute SELECT nomeExame COLLATE utf8mb4_bin as nome, COUNT(*) as total FROM resultadosExames WHERE nomeExame COLLATE utf8mb4_bin IN ('hiv', 'tsh', 'urocultura', 'vdrl') GROUP BY nomeExame COLLATE utf8mb4_bin
